title: Manufacturing Engineer - Wavin India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Wavin India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Wavin India has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wavin India:
Wavin India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wavin India!
